Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller

Class NTriple

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.Marshaller
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.CharMarshaller
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller.NTriple
public class NTriple extends CharMarshaller
A pairing of a NTripleSerializer and NTripleParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.

The general idea is to combine a single serializer and parser inside a simplified API for serializing and parsing POJOs.

Examples:

// Using instance. NTriple nTriple = new NTriple(); MyPojo myPojo = nTriple.to(string, MyPojo.class); String string = nTriple.of(myPojo);

// Using DEFAULT instance. MyPojo myPojo = NTriple.DEFAULT.to(string, MyPojo.class); String string = NTriple.DEFAULT.of(myPojo);

Example output (bean with name/age):

<...> <.../name> "Alice" . <...> <.../age> "30"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#int> .

Complex (nested address + array):

<...> <.../name> "Alice" . <...> <.../age> "30"^^... . <...> <.../address> <.../address> . <.../address> <.../street> "123 Main St" . <.../address> <.../city> "Boston" . <.../address> <.../state> "MA" .

See Also:

      public NTriple(NTripleSerializer s, NTripleParser p)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      s - The serializer to use for serializing output.
      Must not be null.
      p - The parser to use for parsing input.
      Must not be null.
